drugs.name: Nobilis RT+IB Multi+G+ND
drugs.description:
COMPOSITION
- Combined inactivated vaccine for the protection of chickens against disease caused by Avian Turkey Rhinotracheitis virus, Infectious Bronchitis virus, Newcastle Disease virus and Infectious Bursal Disease virus.
- Nobilis RT+IB multi+G+ND contains one immunogenic strain of Avian rhinotracheitis virus (ARTV), two immunogenic strains of Infectious Bronchitis virus (IBV), one immunogenic strain of Infectious Bursal disease virus (IBDV) and one immunogenic strain of Newcastle Disease virus (NDV).
- The IB component contains a Massachusetts type strain and a variant strain belonging to the D274 types.
- The viruses have been inactivated and are suspended in the water phase of an oil adjuvant emulsion.

INDICATION
The vaccine is recommended for the vaccination of breeder stocks for protection against infection with the Massachusetts and D274/D207 serotypes of Infectious Bronchitis virus and Newcastle Disease virus, for protection against the adverse effects of infection with Avian Rhinotracheitis virus, and to provide maternal antibodies in the progeny of the vaccinated birds to protect against Gumboro Disease for at least the first weeks of life The antigens are incorporated in a water-in oil emulsion in order to enhance a prolonges stimulation of immunity.

RECOMMENDED VACCINATION PROGRAMME
Nobilis RT+IB multi+G+ND should be given to birds at around 14-20 weeks of age but not less than 4 weeks before the expected onset of lay. For an optimal booster effect, the birds must be primed with live vaccine against the diseases. The best results will be obtained if vaccination with inactivated vaccine takes place at least 4 weeks after administering the live primer

DOSAGE AND ADMINISTRATION
Each bird should be given 0.5 ml of vaccine intramuscularly in the thigh or breast muscle or subcutaneously into the lower part of the neck.

NOTE
- Vaccinate health birds only.
- Before using vaccine allow it to reach room temperature (15°- 25°C).
- Shake the bottle before use.
- Opened bottles should be used within 3 hours.
- Do not mix with other vaccines.
- Should a vaccinator by accident inject himself or a bystander, the advice of a doctor should be sought, immediately informing the doctor that the vaccine is an oil emulsion.

SPECIAL WARNINGS
• To the user: This veterinary medicinal product contains mineral oil. Accidental injection/self-injection may result in severe and swelling, particularly if injected into a joint or finger, and in rare cases could result in the loss of pain the affected finger if prompt medical attention is not given. If you are accidentally injected with this product, seek prompt medical advice even if only a very small amount is injected and take the package leaflet with you. If pain persists for more Inan 12 hours after medical examination, seek medical advice again.

• To the physician: This veterinary medicinal product contains mineral oil. Even if small amounts have been injected, accidental injection with this product can cause intense swelling, which may, for example, result in ischaemic necrosis and even the loss of a digit. Expert, PROMPT, surgical attention is required and may necessitate early incision and irrigation of the injected area, especially where there is involvement of tinger pulp or tendon.

WITHDRAWAL PERIOD
Nil

STORAGE
- Store at a temperature of 2-8°C and avoid freezing.
- Protect from light.

PACK
Bottles containing 500 ml sufficient for 1000 doses.

Product of:
INTERVET INTERNATIONAL B.V. BOXMEER - HOLLAND

MSD Animal Health
